detail.instructions: The starter already defines AlertEntry and alert_messages. Fill in the two test TODO blocks with checks for keeping Error and Warn entries while excluding Info entries.

hints.body: Use the provided entry helper to build a small array of alert entries.
The first test should prove that warning and error messages are retained in order.
The second test should make the Info exclusion explicit.

detail.completionExplanation: Focused behavior checks document the alert filtering contract. They make the important inclusion and exclusion rules visible for the next reader.
